name: keleusma
description: Language support for Keleusma: syntax highlighting, file-type configuration, and live diagnostics, document symbols, and completion via the keleusma-lsp language server

keleusma.server.enable.description: Run the keleusma-lsp language server for live diagnostics, document symbols, and completion. Disable to use syntax highlighting only.

keleusma.server.path.description: Path to the keleusma-lsp binary. Defaults to `keleusma-lsp` on PATH. Build it with `cargo build --release` in the keleusma-lsp/ directory and set this to the absolute path of target/release/keleusma-lsp, or install it with `cargo install --path keleusma-lsp`.
